sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports coughing up blood, and reports coughing for three weeks. He denies leg swelling, bruising, or bleeding. The patient is coughing.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 110/70 mmHg. Heart rate is 88 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of diabetes and is presenting with hematemesis. Differential includes pulmonary embolism, gastrointestinal bleed, and infection.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: A chest x-ray is ordered. A cat scan is ordered. The doctor plans to increase the metformin dose from 500mg twice daily to 750mg twice daily. The doctor plans to increase the metformin dose.
